headings.usage: Hero headers, section titles, card titles. Use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter for sizes above 32px.

body.usage: Paragraphs, labels, small text. Use leading-relaxed for better readability.

labels.usage: Uppercase, tiny text with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]) for overlines and tags.

textures.noise: Subtle grain overlay (opacity-20) to break digital flatness.
textures.mesh_gradient: Deep blurred radial gradients behind hero sections using primary and accent colors.

buttons.primary: rounded-lg bg-[#7C3AED] text-white font-medium px-6 py-3 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#6D28D9] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(124,58,237,0.5)] hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: rounded-lg bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white font-medium px-6 py-3 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white/10

cards.default: rounded-2xl bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 p-6 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/20
cards.highlighted_pricing: rounded-2xl bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-2 border-[#7C3AED] relative overflow-hidden shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(124,58,237,0.3)] scale-100 lg:scale-105 p-8

inputs.default: w-full rounded-lg bg-[#020617] border border-white/20 text-white px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#7C3AED] focus:border-transparent transition-all placeholder:text-slate-500

badges.status_success: px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/20 text-[10px] md:text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider
badges.status_pending: px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/20 text-[10px] md:text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider
badges.status_error: px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border border-red-500/20 text-[10px] md:text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider

sidebar.default: bg-[#020617] border-r border-white/10 w-64 flex-shrink-0 flex flex-col hidden lg:flex h-screen sticky top-0
sidebar.nav_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-200
sidebar.nav_item_active: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-white bg-[#7C3AED]/10 border border-[#7C3AED]/20 shadow-[inset_4px_0_0_#7C3AED]

motion.entrance: Use framer-motion. Initial: opacity-0, translate-y-4. Animate: opacity-100, translate-y-0. Stagger children for lists/grids.
motion.particles: Slow-moving, subtle particles in the hero background (react-tsparticles).
motion.marquee: Continuous, smooth horizontal scrolling for live crypto prices (react-fast-marquee).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards against dark backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings (`focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#7C3AED]`).
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

images.description: Abstract neon crypto background (dark/purple) - use with low opacity/overlay in hero section

instructions_to_main_agent: You are applying a pure visual redesign. DO NOT change API endpoints, route logic, calculation logic, or remove any functionality.
Install required dependencies: `yarn add framer-motion react-fast-marquee react-tsparticles tsparticles recharts sonner lucide-react embla-carousel-react clsx tailwind-merge`
Add 'Clash Display' font to the project (e.g., via fontshare CDN in index.html or global css) and set it up in tailwind.config.js.

For the Homepage Hero: Create a massive, immersive section. Use the abstract dark image provided, heavily blended with #0F172A using gradients. Overlay 'react-tsparticles' for subtle dust/stars effect.

For the Crypto Ticker: Place it right below the navigation or hero. Use 'react-fast-marquee' for a smooth infinite scroll of mocked coin prices (BTC, ETH, SOL, etc.) with positive/negative color indicators (green/red text).
For 'Why Choose Us': Implement a BENTO grid layout (e.g., 1 large feature card, 2 medium, 2 small) with hover lift and glow effects. Use `framer-motion` for entrance.
For Investment Packages: Create 3 side-by-side cards on desktop. The middle (or highest tier) card must have a glowing neon border, scale-105 on large screens, and a prominent CTA button.
For Testimonials: Build a smooth slider using Embla Carousel.
For User Dashboard: Ensure a dark sidebar (fixed on desktop). Use high-density data cards (cardless or very subtle border-white/5) for Balance, ROI, etc.

For Admin Dashboard: Implement dark/light toggle but default to Dark. Use compact list views for users/transactions. Statuses (Pending, Success, Error) MUST use the pill-shaped colored badges defined in the design guidelines.
Ensure all nested routes and navigation still work perfectly after applying new layouts.
CRITICAL: Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs).
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💡, etc) for icons. Use lucide-react.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations separate good from extraordinary.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
